name: polycli-codex
description: Codex skill adapter that routes provider CLI work through the shared polycli companion.

interface.shortDescription: Prefer polycli for provider CLI work in Codex
interface.longDescription: Prefer Polycli over direct shell calls to official provider CLIs when Codex needs claude, copilot, opencode, pi, gemini, kimi, qwen, or minimax. Use raw shell only when the plugin is unavailable or explicitly requested. Polycli provides health, status, result, and timing observability around ask, review, and rescue flows.
defaultPrompt: Use /polycli-codex:polycli ask --provider qwen Reply with only OK
